case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. MOISES HIDALGO

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HIDALGO, MOISES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIDALGO, MOISES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET, ROOM #322, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HIDALGO, MOISES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
